headline: Staff SRE at Stripe | Incident Command · Chaos Engineering · Platform Reliability
about: I design systems that fail gracefully and recover fast. Nine years of SRE — I've led incident command on outages affecting millions of payment transactions and built the chaos engineering programme that now runs continuously across Stripe's production fleet. My goal is always the same: make on-call boring.

experience.title: Staff Site Reliability Engineer
bullets: Owned SLO framework adopted across 80+ services; reduced error budget burn alerts by 62%
Led GameDay program running 200+ fault-injection experiments per year across production-mirror environments
Drove MTTR from 47 minutes to 11 minutes for Tier-1 incidents through runbook automation and on-call tooling improvements
Mentored 6 SRE engineers and 2 SWE-to-SRE transition engineers

experience.title: Senior Site Reliability Engineer
bullets: Managed reliability of DNS infrastructure serving 1.1 trillion queries/day
Implemented automated capacity planning that prevented three capacity-related incidents in 2019
Designed observability stack (Prometheus + Grafana + custom alerting) for 200-node Kafka cluster

headline: Senior SRE at Datadog | Observability Infrastructure · Kubernetes · Toil Reduction
about: I eat toil for breakfast so engineers can ship at 5pm on Fridays. Six years in SRE — I specialise in building the observability tooling and automation that makes operational work sustainable at scale.

experience.title: Senior Site Reliability Engineer
bullets: Reduced on-call toil by 40% by automating 15 runbooks into self-healing Kubernetes operators
Built internal SLO-as-code tooling now used by 120+ product engineers to define and track service SLOs
Led cross-org reliability review that identified and resolved 8 systemic reliability gaps

experience.title: Production Engineer
bullets: Owned reliability for Messenger notification delivery serving 1B+ users
Implemented quota-based rate limiting that eliminated cascading failure mode during Super Bowl traffic spikes

headline: Platform SRE at Shopify | Multi-region Kubernetes · Error Budgets · Developer Experience
about: I make platforms that developers trust. Eight years at the intersection of infrastructure and developer experience — I build the reliability primitives (SLOs, runbooks, chaos tests) that let product teams move fast without breaking things.

experience.title: Senior Platform SRE
bullets: Architected multi-region active-active deployment pattern now used by 30+ core Shopify services
Established error budget policy adopted company-wide; connected reliability metrics to sprint planning for the first time
Cut mean deployment rollback time from 22 minutes to under 4 minutes through progressive delivery tooling
Ran quarterly reliability reviews with VP Engineering; influenced roadmap prioritisation for platform investments

experience.title: SRE
bullets: Managed reliability of the container runtime serving 10M+ deployments per month
Implemented capacity planning model that eliminated three over-provisioning incidents in 2017

headline: SRE Lead at Grafana Labs | Open Source · Mimir · Distributed Storage Reliability
about: I work on the tools SREs use every day — which means I hold my own systems to an unusually high standard. Seven years in reliability engineering, now leading the SRE function for Grafana's hosted metrics platform.

experience.title: SRE Lead
bullets: Led 4-person SRE team responsible for Grafana Cloud metrics platform processing 500M series
Drove 99.95% → 99.99% availability improvement for Mimir ingest path over 8-month reliability sprint
Authored public postmortem format adopted as open standard by 200+ companies in cloud-native community
Represented Grafana at KubeCon SRE track; presented talk with 1,200+ attendees

experience.title: Senior SRE
bullets: Owned reliability of Actions runner infrastructure scaling to 500K concurrent CI jobs during peak
Designed autoscaling policies that reduced runner idle cost by $1.2M/year without impacting job latency

headline: Senior SRE at Twilio | Telecom Infrastructure · Five Nines · Incident Management
about: Telecom reliability is unforgiving — a dropped call at 2am is someone's emergency. Ten years in carrier-grade and cloud SRE, the last four at Twilio keeping the voice and messaging infrastructure at five nines.

experience.title: Senior Site Reliability Engineer
bullets: Maintained 99.999% availability for voice call routing infrastructure handling 2B+ minutes per month
Designed multi-region failover architecture that survived a complete AWS us-east-1 degradation event
Built automated incident severity classifier that cut SEV-1 misclassification rate by 70%
Established SRE on-call rotation and escalation paths for a 12-person globally distributed team

experience.title: Infrastructure Engineer
bullets: Migrated telecom media servers from bare metal to AWS; achieved parity availability within 6 months
Built capacity forecasting model for SMS infrastructure that prevented 2 capacity incidents in 2018
